title: CBSE 12th result 2026 LIVE: Students wait hours after Board’s ‘coming soon’ update, results on cbseresults.nic.in
description: CBSE 12th result 2026 LIVE: Many students are now waiting for their results to be announced. DigiLocker and UMANG app are displaying the ‘coming soon’ pop-up on their sites, but there is no update on cbseresults.nic.in
